summary: Portfolio shows improving momentum with chief-scout recovering from critical state and kb returning from dormancy. However, director remains completely stalled with zero activity for 30+ days, and multiple high-priority projects lack deployment infrastructure.

soft-power.one_liner: Sustained high velocity with 26 commits this week, still needs CI/CD setup

director.one_liner: Completely stalled for 30+ days, critical game project needs revival

chief-scout.one_liner: Still broken with failing workflows but showing improved activity

kb.one_liner: No activity for 30 days despite being functional

language-tidbits.one_liner: Exceptional pace with 28 commits this week, needs CI/CD

brain-levelup.one_liner: Steady acceleration with 4 commits this week

crumble.one_liner: Dormant for 30+ days - needs decision on future

neutralworking.one_liner: Minimal but consistent activity with 3 commits

head-of-product.one_liner: Strong momentum with 11 commits, has blocking TODOs

needs_decision.recommendation: Archive as completed - 30+ days of inactivity with working CI/CD suggests completion
